meaning: n.&adj.(英国广播公司科学幻想电视节目中机器人)戴立克(的)
examples: This synthesizer is by far the best I have heard, because it varies the intonation, and doesn't speak like a Dalek.
It turns out that Oswin has erased memory of the Doctor from every single Dalek.
No more picture needed, you can try the handbag next to your jacket, see how big the inflatable Dalek really is, and everything else shoppers like to do.
Admittedly, we have yet to see a Dalek taken down with a baseball bat (oh, Ace, how I loved thee), but it may be a matter of time.
